description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named runtime-build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have a concurrency group that cancels in-progress jobs for non-master and non-release branches. It should have two jobs: build-native-runtime and build-cross-linux-runtime. The build-native-runtime job should run on a matrix of macOS, Ubuntu, and Windows environments, setting up the build environment, Python, and Conan, then configuring, building, installing, testing, and uploading the nncaseruntime build artifact. The build-cross-linux-runtime job should run on Ubuntu, setting up Python, installing the toolchain and QEMU, then configuring, building, installing, testing, and uploading the nncaseruntime build artifact.
